rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Charging Judgment Debtor Charles Towey'S Interest In Limited Liability Companies
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's motion to charge the judgment debtor's interest in limited liability companies is granted. No opposition has been filed. (610/BCHAN)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion Ofr Orders Compelling Attendance & Deposition.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Bertha Joung's Motion For Order Compelling Attendance At Deposition; Compelling Answers And Further Answers To Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories; and Compelling Responses, Further Responses, and Production of Documents In Response To Petitioner's First Request For Production of Documents is granted as it seeks the following evidentiary sanctions: Respondent Camelia Kao is barred from offering any testimony at trial; Respondent Camelia Kao is barred from presenting any evidence, testimonial, documentary, or expert as to any claimed defenses not previously presented in written discovery responses. Respondent Camelia Kao is barred from propounding any further discovery or noticing any depositions. The court does not find that the assertion of the Fifth Amendment was improper. Any objections to the appointment of a guardian ad litem for Respondent must be addressed to the court that made the appointment. The court finds that additional orders to participate in discovery would not result in compliance. Petitioner's failure to respond to discovery, failure to appear for deposition, and her failure to comply with the court's prior order are misuses of the discovery process. The court imposes additional monetary sanctions against Respondent in the amount of $2,136.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)
